_comment_1: Copy this file to credentials.json and replace BOTH api_key and base_url with your actual values
_comment_3: REQUIRED: base_url - The full URL to your MOCA Library instance (e.g., https://library.example.com)
_comment_4: collection_id will be auto-populated with the OpenClaw collection ID on first sync
_comment_5: All memory files are uploaded ONLY to the OpenClaw collection
